title: rhododendron citriniflorum
intro: Rhododendron citriniflorum, also known as the Yellow Rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron citriniflorum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and capsules, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
